dialog.stepLabel: Carlotta: "There was a time when the currents swept us into the jaws of..."

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: There was a time when the currents swept us into the jaws of uncharted waters, where relentless storms and voracious waves awaited. But after weathering such trials, they revealed to us a hidden gem—the Shores themselves.

options.text: You're talking about the Black Shores.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: My family has always been drawn to the thrill of a new voyage. One stormy night, fate decided to play a hand. What we discovered there on that island, the technology and novel ideas, was nothing short of a blessing in disguise.

options.text: You sent the troupe to pick me up?
You sent that invitation?
But what's in it for your family? I assume you seek more than just a "free market"?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: There exists only one relatively safe route from the Black Shores to Ragunna—a path known solely to the Montelli family. As long as you stayed on this course, you were bound to encounter the troupe.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Exactly. When we heard the Black Shores were hunting for a legitimate entry into Ragunna, I thought, why not bring them into our little venture? Hence, the invitation.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Our intentions might not be as grandiose or ominous as you think. We seek liberation, and to achieve it, we're pursuing the truth behind Rinascita's origins.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Legend has it that when people first arrived on this island, <ano=The first beacon in Rinascita>Genesis Nexus</ano> was already here, welcoming them.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The prevailing belief is that the Sentinel gifted us this technology, and despite nobody ever seeing the Sentinel in person, we talk with Them through supposed "telepathy." Notice anything strange about that story?

options.text: The first beacon…
The Sentinel…

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Terminals conjure up Echoes, and the Genesis Nexus allows the Ragunnesi access to Common Echoes.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: If the Genesis Nexus was present when the first settlers arrived, who built it?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: And really, if no one's ever laid eyes on the Sentinel, how can we be so sure that statue really represents Them?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: It seems to me the Order might have spun us a tale, hiding the true origins behind their grand myths.

options.text: Does the Montelli family seek to rule?
Are the Montellis turning away from Rinascita's beliefs?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: No, we have no ambitions to rule or to renounce our faith. And really, this city should not be ruled by any one entity.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The hour grows late. I have arranged accommodations for you at Palazzo Agrotta in the south. Let us walk there together, and I can share a story along the way.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Think of it as a bedtime tale. I learned it from the troupe. It is about Fleurdelys, the Blessed Maiden.

dialog.stepLabel: Carlotta: "The people of this island came from diverse civilizations no..."

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The people of this island came from diverse civilizations now lost to time, but through plays and tradition, they sought to preserve memories of their heritage.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: In the past, while the clash of cultures led to conflict, the Ragunnesi united through faith, restoring balance, even if precarious.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: To maintain this unity, we have always needed both a Sentinel and a "play" based on a shared legend that gives us roles.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Yet, this play has endured for so long that we have become defined by our roles—noble, commoner, believer, merchant. What was meant to unite us now stifles us.

options.text: Integration was the past.
Liberation is the present.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Now, we yearn for a day when we can truly set aside our titles and positions, express our true selves, and join together in celebration...

options.text: So, this is the true purpose of the Carnevale.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Yes, born from hope and idealism, it reminds the Ragunnesi of our initial vision of equality and freedom. It also affirms our true worth.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: While the Order's true intentions remain unclear, we are certain their influence has already eroded the very foundations of our society.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: People revere the divine figure the Order has constructed, yet they also live in fear of punishment.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Legends become accomplices in fostering ignorance, and faith becomes the loyal executioner of cruel punishment. An invisible cage has trapped us all...

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Speaking of freedom within a cage is absurd. Fear and ignorance are our foremost enemies.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: This year's Carnevale will spark a flame fierce enough to burn down that cage.

options.text: Freedom is in our nature.
Our future is in our own hands.
I'll stoke the flames even higher.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Rest well, and tomorrow, we shall take the stage together at the Carnevale.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Good night. May your dreams be sweet.

dialog.stepLabel: Step 54

items.text: After all you've been through, your body aches for rest. As you sink into the soft bed, you let your thoughts settle and drift into a peaceful sleep, preparing yourself for the excitement and challenges of the upcoming Carnevale.

dialog.stepLabel: Carlotta: "Once, the Blessed Maiden was just a simple peasant girl. Dur..."

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Once, the Blessed Maiden was just a simple peasant girl. During the Sentinel's Gratitude Rite, the young Fleurdelys managed to sneak past the guards and drink the sacramental wine—every drop.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Perhaps it was the intoxicating wine in Egla Town or simply her lack of experience with spirits, but she soon found herself quite drunk.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Swaying on her feet, she ascended the ceremony's grand platform, lifted her threadbare dress, and began a rather ungainly dance.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Seizing the sacred horn, she played a carefree folk tune, dodging the guards and weaving through the crowd with surprising agility.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Remarkably, the crowd, as if drawn by an unseen force, followed her lead, transforming the solemn ceremony into a wild parade of cheers and revelry.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Naturally, the Order was less than pleased. The Pilgrim's Sail did not yet exist, so Fleurdelys faced three days of confinement. During that time, she used her prison walls as a canvas.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: That unforgettable day of disordered revelry left a lasting mark on all who witnessed it.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Is it not remarkable? A rebellious girl, chosen by the Sentinel to become the Blessed Maiden.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: If the Sentinel indeed permitted such a girl to serve as Their spokesperson, it suggests that all this joyous revelry is not something They disdain.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Perhaps They too enjoy poetry, painting, tears, laughter, romantic tales of knights, and dancing amidst crowds—much like ourselves.

dialog.stepLabel: Brant: "Raise your glasses! Shout it loud, friends!..."

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Raise your glasses! Shout it loud, friends!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: To us, to the Carnevale, and to our very own Laureate, {PlayerName}!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: A name that echoes through the world, destined to roam the skies before shaking the earth!

options.text: Hear, hear! That's me!
Please, stop. You're making me feel embarrassed…

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Hahaha! There you are, my friend! A compliment, if too subtle, loses all its charm!

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: Don't be fooled by how he looks. Brant is already deep in his cups, drunk as a skunk.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Oh, let him enjoy himself. The taste of victory is still fresh, and after such a battle, we should celebrate to the fullest!

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Drink your fill, everyone! This round's on me!

items.speaker: Everyone
items.text: HOORAY!!!

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: Hmm, I see… Someone's been eavesdropping.

options.text: Looks like we've attracted some unwanted attention.
Aren't we in your family's safe house?

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: A devout Acolyte wouldn't enter such a place without a good reason.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The Montelli family is known for its hospitality, but freeloaders... will not find us so welcoming.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Friends, let's keep the mood lively!

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Come, let's discuss the information we've gathered so far.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: During the Carnevale, you heard the Sentinel's voice and found a girl named Cartethyia. We've dug up some information on her.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: In the Order, every high-ranking Acolyte is given a new name.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: We contacted the Acolyte, Phoebe. After some digging in the Order's records, she confirmed that before taking on her holy title, the Blessed Fleurdelys was called... Cartethyia.

options.text: So, she is the Sentinel's Resonator.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: But the Blessed Maiden... she martyred herself twenty years ago...

options.text: There must be more to it than that...
I just saw a ghost?!
Did someone pretend to be her?
Did the Blessed Maiden suddenly come back from the dead?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The family will uncover the truth. The only remaining clue is the "inverted tower" you mentioned hearing about from the Sentinel, but even that feels elusive...

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: Judging by your expression, you must have discovered something new, right?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Do you recall what we learned from the stained glass in the Tower Ruins? There were two divinities at the dawn of Rinascita.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: If one refers to the Sentinel, then the other, who could stand alongside Them, might be the Threnodian.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The two are undoubtedly linked, so uncovering one could lead us to the other.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Remember Gilberto, from the Fisalia family? It took a lot to get him to talk, but we finally got some information from him.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: As he tells it, the Fisalia family's long-revered deity is none other than... Leviathan, the Threnodian from the sea's depths.

options.text: They worship the Threnodian…

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: It's hard to believe, I know. But recent events have only reinforced what we discovered from the stained glass.

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: The Fisalia family has been on this island since the founding of Rinascita, so their worship of the Threnodian may have persisted for centuries.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: We will attempt to establish contact with the Fisalias to build an alliance and gather more intelligence.

options.text: Do you think they'll be willing?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Rest assured, negotiation is what we do best. If necessary, we'll present them with an offer they can't refuse.

items.speaker: Quiet Acolyte
items.text: Excuse me for the interruption. Greetings, esteemed guest.

items.speaker: Quiet Acolyte
items.text: The Primus wishes to invite you for a conversation at the Cathedral of Mercury. Would you be so inclined?

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: How curious. Since when has the Primus become so interested in social calls?

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: It could very well be a trap.

items.speaker: Quiet Acolyte
items.text: I'm merely conveying the Primus' invitation. The choice is yours.

options.text: Don't worry, he wouldn't dare do anything to me.
Perfect timing. I have many questions for him.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Remember, you're not alone. If anything happens, just let us know.

items.speaker: Quiet Acolyte
items.text: Very well, please follow me to the Cathedral of Mercury.

dialog.stepLabel: Fulmine: "Ah, {PlayerName} and Lady Phoebe! I've been capturing the Ca..."

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: Ah, {PlayerName} and Lady Phoebe! I've been capturing the Carnevale's many beautiful moments! What brings you all together here?

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: Hmm? You took this picture? Look at that composition and lighting! Who knew you had a knack for photography!

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: Buddy, you look so happy! Whatever the reason, thanks for making this moment special!

items.speaker: C-MOSS
items.text: *Humph!*

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: It's all thanks to {PlayerName}. {Male=He;Female=She} fulfilled C-MOSS's wish.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Just like us, C-MOSS wants to savor every moment of the Carnevale and leave with no regrets.

options.text: You seem excited about the Carnevale too.
Why not join us in the celebration?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: The Sentinel cherishes Their people, and as followers, we find joy in witnessing everyone's happiness.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: But we have our duties, ensuring order during the Carnevale. I'm sorry I can't join in the festivities.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: I wish you a wonderful time at the Carnevale!

dialog.stepLabel: Carlotta: "Ah, you're here...."

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Ah, you're here.

options.text: It's quite lively.
Anything unusual?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: For the Ragunnesi, the Carnevale has always been an occasion to revel with abandon. It's what they truly desire.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: All seems well for the moment.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The family is prepared. They'll support our plan should the need arise.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: We must remain vigilant. The Fractsidus may be lurking, observing our every move.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: It's nearly time. The troupe should be arriving at the harbor shortly.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: How do you feel? Ready to step into the spotlight?

options.text: I couldn't be more ready.
I'm still a bit nervous.
I'm tired of all the formalities.
I have something else to attend to.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Excellent. We have the skills. Now it's all about improvisation.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: It's only natural. It's your first show. If it helps, I'm a bit nervous myself. Let's consider it a rehearsal, shall we? There are grander stages yet to come.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Then let's cast aside all inhibitions and dance to the rhythm of this grand celebration!

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: I'll be waiting here for you.

dialog.stepLabel: Step 81
Step 84
锁定时间为夜晚10点

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Ah, we've arrived. Such a small world, isn't it, {PlayerName}?

options.text: I remember you.
Why did you run?
What is the Fractsidus doing here?

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Oh, what an honor to be remembered! Let's continue our conversation somewhere lively and grand, a place worthy of the Carnevale, not some dreary, dull corner.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: They say the thrill of the chase surpasses the joy of the catch. And with this view of Ragunna, one can truly savor its splendor.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Oh, don't fret. I've been invited to this grand feast as a conductor.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Decadence, indulgence… Hehe, that's the Carnevale—a vivid daydream and grand illusion for all.

options.text: Tell me what you really came to say.
Whatever you're plotting, I won't let it happen.
Just so you know, your predecessor's gibberish landed him in prison.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: No need to worry, I won't disrupt their little daydream. Besides, we still have business to do here.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Now that you know what makes the Sentinel so unique, you should know we seek the same thing. That extraordinary Resonator.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: How about I share a little story with you? A gesture of goodwill for our cooperation.

options.text: Go ahead, tell me.
Not interested.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Now, now. Patience is a virtue. A story is best enjoyed with a captivating performance, and this stage is perfectly set for it.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: It's fine. I do appreciate the noble lady's sentiment—a wise investment often bears fruit in the most unexpected ways.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: We're simply spreading the truth through a tale. I'm certain it will pique your interest, so consider this a heartfelt invitation to you and your companions.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Join us, pour your essence into this endless play, and use your humble strength to defy the raging current of fate!

dialog.stepLabel: Carlotta: "As anticipated, the Fractsidus is on the move...."

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: As anticipated, the Fractsidus is on the move.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Now, remember the rehearsal we did yesterday? All our preparations have led to this very moment.

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: She intends to use those Lycorises to summon and control the Tacet Discords. If we destroy the Lycorises, we can neutralize them.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: Everyone is in position. We'll manage the west plaza.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: Phoebe is stationed at the east plaza, keeping an eye on things.

items.speaker: Zani
items.text: The main stage is all yours for the grand performance.

options.text: To ensure the performance runs smoothly...
...we'll need a host.

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: I'll take care of the lighting and create the mood to make the performance stand out.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Leave that to me.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Ready? The spotlight will be on you two.

options.text: Let's go, partner.
We're already part of the play.
As actors, we can't afford to have cold feet.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: The curtain has been lifted. We can't keep our audience waiting.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Then...

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Ladies and gentlemen! The grandest and most spectacular performance of the Carnevale is about to commence!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Let us give a warm round of applause as our actors now take the stage!

dialog.stepLabel: Brant: "The heroes breach the first barrier, sweeping away the monst..."

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: The heroes breach the first barrier, sweeping away the monsters within the city!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Now, they advance towards the Demon King's castle, where peril await at every corner... What trials lie ahead?

dialog.stepLabel: Proceed to the next stage

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Exercise caution. New enemies have appeared.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: The Demon King unleashes its minions, long awaiting these audacious intruders...

dialog.stepLabel: 第二幕演出结束

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Watch out!

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: Now!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Ah! A sudden twist unbalanced the heroes, then at this crucial moment, a mysterious figure enters the fray!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: A Divinity-sent emissary? Or a spirit from the shadows perhaps?

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: She seems moved by their passion and righteousness,  see her join the heroes' ranks!

items.speaker: Demon King (Phrolova)
items.text: Ah, how delightful! I await your challenge with bated breath...

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: It seems the Demon King anticipated the heroes' arrival and has gladly extended an invitation...

dialog.stepLabel: Brant: "With unyielding determination, the heroes accept the challen..."

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: With unyielding determination, the heroes accept the challenge!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: The Demon King reveals itself at last, exposing its hideous visage and sharp fangs. The final showdown is nigh!

dialog.stepLabel: Brant: "Amidst the clashing swords and the cries of the minions, the..."

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Amidst the clashing swords and the cries of the minions, the heroes face the Demon King—victory belongs to the righteous and the brave!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: And now, we await the Holy Maiden's return...

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: And so we arrive at the "happily ever after," yes?

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: But we do not live in a fairy tale. There is no playwright to script a happy ending for us... What lies behind the curtain is but a cruel jest, a dark satire.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Let me reveal the truth behind that idyllic ending. The Holy Maiden has long succumbed to darkness, drawing power from a heretical force and leading her people into depravity.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: And the minister, having uncovered this truth, has vowed to root out this corruption himself.

dialog.stepLabel: Phrolova: "Ah, come now. Let us embrace the grand climax of this revelr..."

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Ah, come now. Let us embrace the grand climax of this revelry!

dialog.stepLabel: Roccia: "You should take center stage for the final bow, {PlayerName}..."

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: You should take center stage for the final bow, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Hear that? The thunderous roar of applause! It has been far too long! This is the true essence of the Carnevale!

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: At last, the crisis has been resolved.

options.text: It's our hard-earned victory.
They're cheering for us all.

items.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I have heard… thy call…
I have awaited thee… for what seems like an eternity…

options.text: I have many questions for you.
How are you holding up?
Where can I find you?

items.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I am ensnared...
Beyond the clouds and among the stars... thou shalt find an inverted tower suspended in the sky—I am there, watching over Solaris from above.
The Lost... doth wander briefly amongst thy kind...
Seek her out… She, too, doth move within the folds of this festival...

dialog.stepLabel: Abby: "How can that be? That Blessed Maiden... could she really be ..."

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: How can that be? That Blessed Maiden... could she really be the Threnodian's Resonator? What if the Primus's words were a bunch of baloney?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: But we saw Cartethyia following the Sentinel's instructions... They wouldn't mix up Their own Resonator, right?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Ugh, now my head hurts... Who was she really with? The Sentinel? Or the Threnodian?

options.text: He didn't seem like he was lying.
He definitely seemed like he was hiding something important.
Ugh, my head is starting to hurt too...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Well, probably won't get any more answers from him...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: All the clues we've gathered so far point to the Threnodian.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: And the Fisalia family worships the Threnodian. We'll have to wait for Carlotta to arrange an audience with them.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Something tells me this Carnevale is just the beginning. There's more ahead, I'm sure of it.

dialog.stepLabel: ???: "The next move is… hmm, am I getting this right? It feels a b..."

items.text: The next move is… hmm, am I getting this right? It feels a bit off...

options.text: Hello.
Try stepping back with your left foot first.
Dancing is not in rigid steps. Let your heart lead the way.

items.text: You are…
No, never mind… Anyway, your performance was splendid!
I'm here for the Carnevale as well. It's been ages since I've seen something as grand as this.
I love hearing the laughter and cheers of a crowd, no matter the occasion.
Kind stranger, could you show me those final steps from your curtain call?
I'm sorry, but I can't stay here any longer. I must return...

options.text: Can you tell me your name before you go?

items.text: My name? It's… um…

items.speaker: Cartethyia
items.text: Fl… No, I'm Cartethyia… Yes, that's right. Cartethyia.

items.speaker: Cartethyia
items.text: Farewell, Laureate! I hope that someday, I might stand on stage with your troupe.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Are you alright, {PlayerName}? Some family members mentioned you were speaking to a wall… I'm worried you might still be under Phrolova's spell.

options.text: A wall? You didn't see her?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: See who? Are you truly alright?

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Cartethyia… I'll make a note of it.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: If she was indeed here, she is likely still in Ragunna. I will have my family start searching.

options.text: Let's not alarm the public just yet.
We should let the Carnevale continue as planned.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: There are still many unresolved questions regarding the Order and the Sentinel. We need time to sort through what we've gathered.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Rushing into action now might only alert the Order's spies and disrupt what we've worked so hard to protect.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: You're right.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Cartethyia... I will have my family find out more about her.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: If we find out anything, I'll contact you, and we can discuss our next steps together.

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Until then, as you suggested…

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: Let's keep this Carnevale going.

dialog.stepLabel: 【夜晚大清场】
Abby: "Wow! Is this real? Pinch me. I can't believe how different e..."

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Wow! Is this real? Pinch me. I can't believe how different everything looks! So this is the Carnevale, huh?

dialog.stepLabel: 【重新启用地图功能】

items.text: With the crisis behind you, you and your companions spend the day basking in cheers and applause.
Later, back at the Palazzo Agrotta, you drift off to sleep, replaying the day's memories from the Carnevale.

dialog.stepLabel: Roccia: "You should take center stage for the final bow, {PlayerName}..."

items.speaker: Roccia
items.text: You should take center stage for the final bow, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Hear that? The thunderous roar of applause! It has been far too long! This is the true essence of the Carnevale!

items.speaker: Carlotta
items.text: At last, the crisis has been resolved.

options.text: It's our hard-earned victory.
They're cheering for us all.

items.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I have heard… thy call…
I have awaited thee… for what seems like an eternity…

options.text: I have many questions for you.
How are you holding up?
Where can I find you?

items.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I am ensnared...
Beyond the clouds and among the stars... thou shalt find an inverted tower suspended in the sky—I am there, watching over Solaris from above.
The Lost... doth wander briefly amongst thy kind...
Seek her out… She, too, doth move within the folds of this festival...

dialog.stepLabel: ???: "Phrolova, you do have a knack for indulging in... pointless ..."

items.text: Phrolova, you do have a knack for indulging in... pointless little chores.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Why, there's no rule against an actor making good use of the intermission.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Besides, I haven't disrupted your arrangement, have I?

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: "The one from a faraway land who discerns the truth dares to raise their sword against the divine. In response, the slumbering gods break free from their shackles, revealing their true forms..."

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: The possibility of the Second Resonance Awakening is now a certainty. So we just need to see if that special Resonator truly exists.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Was the Blessed Maiden a Resonator for the Sentinel or the Threnodian?

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Or both? If so... Oh, a Resonator capable of wielding both powers... I am eager to see how this story ends.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Cristoforo, if you don't want to spoil the next act, I might have to give your carefully crafted plot a little nudge.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Speaking of which, {PlayerName} shines brighter than anyone else in your play. Do you find {Male=him;Female=her} interesting as well?

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Phrolova, it seems we walk different paths. I don't share your fondness for that sort of... puppet theater.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: I merely place the characters on their stage and they act out their fates, driven by their own volition.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: To remain courageous amidst absurdity, to pursue a spark of divine grace—this, to me, is the truest essence of humanity, don't you think?

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Even the most pristine cadence of death pales beside the untamed, fervent, and tenacious spirits of the living.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: In their journey, they resolutely overcome all obstacles: they pursue, they tear, they burn—simply because they desire to.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: I think you should leave your secluded mansion. Take a walk and listen to the voices scattered across the world.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: …Perhaps.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: From Huanglong to Rinascita, {Male=he;Female=she} has indeed added a few unexpectedly beautiful notes to my symphony.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: I am certain that, even without any direction, {Male=he;Female=she} will walk the path that destiny has laid before {Male=him;Female=her}.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: All things ascend towards a singular point of convergence, and what awaits at the end is... immortality.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Before the tides of fate, we are all but…

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: …humble servants.

dialog.stepLabel: Abby: "I can't wait to explore! Oh, by the way, it's been a while s..."

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: I can't wait to explore! Oh, by the way, it's been a while since we last saw Zani and Phoebe. Wonder what they're up to right now...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Alright, let's go. We should also keep an eye out for anything unusual along the way.

dialog.stepLabel: ???: "Never before have I seen a day so steeped in both shadow and..."

items.text: Never before have I seen a day so steeped in both shadow and light.
The birds sing, the flowers bloom… yet this world knows neither true joy nor eternity.
Come closer, Righteous One, there's no need for hesitation.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: I am Fenrico, the Primus of the Order of the Deep. Your deeds have reached my ears, and I have long wished to meet you. Alas, the burdens of this world delayed our meeting until now. I beg your pardon for the wait.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Please accept my respect for you—you and your troupe have shown great talent and ambition, breathing new life into Ragunna.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: I ask you to deliver this message to your companions: from this day forth, the troupe shall have permanent rights to perform within the city.

options.text: I surely will.
Even if they're all Fools?

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: All mortals stumble, but through pilgrimage, they have cleansed their souls and atoned for their transgressions. They have earned their right to return to this divinely blessed land.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: I understand that questions weigh on your heart. In the presence of a just Divinity, speak freely, and I will answer with all the honesty I possess.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: By the great Sentinel Imperator, I swear to you. There shall be no deceit in my words.

options.text: I want to meet the Sentinel Imperator.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: You have walked a path similar to Theirs. Indeed, you have the right to meet Them.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: However, due to the Dark Tide two decades ago, the Sentinel's body was gravely wounded and remains in a state of recovery.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: If you wish to meet Them, I will convey your request.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: I see the thirst for truth in your eyes. It is clear that doubts still linger in your heart. Please, voice your concerns.

options.text: Tell me about the Blessed Fleurdelys.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Fleurdelys... She was the emissary of the Sentinel, and we are grateful for her contributions.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Twenty years ago, during the Dark Tide, she sacrificed herself to seal the calamity. She fulfilled her duties in this world and returned to the <color=yellow>divine embrace</color>.

options.text: Returned to the divine embrace?

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Do you know how the Dark Tide came into being?

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: In Rinascita, wars were waged in the name of faith, tearing apart the Sentinel as our faith divided, weakening Their divine power.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: The Dark Tide's true essence is the divine blood shed from the Sentinel's wounds.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: That tragic past left deep scars, and with Their divine power drained, They could not prevent the Dark Tide's surge twenty years ago.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: The Blessed Maiden chose to martyr herself. She <color=yellow>once again</color> resonated with the Sentinel and, through her sacrifice, restored some of Their divine power, bringing an end to the Dark Tide.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Yet, the Sentinel remains in a state of healing and still requires a mortal representative. Following the Blessed Maiden's departure, I was granted new authority to cleanse the aftermath of the Dark Tide.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: I received the Divinity's blessing and became the new Enlightened One. By Their will, I fulfill the tasks left unfinished in this world.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Therefore, we must unify all beliefs, ensuring the purity and unity of our will to prevent another tragedy...

options.text: (Reflect on the Blessed Maiden's Second Resonance with the Sentinel.)

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (He said she "once again resonated with the Sentinel," was that really a Second Resonance Awakening? Sentinel Jué had a trial with Jinhsi, but my permission was needed to transfer the Sentinel's power...)

options.text: You're hiding things from me.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: I swear, my words are without deceit.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: I see in your eyes that you have walked further on the path of justice than I anticipated.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: O dear Sentinel… please forgive my transgressions.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: The Dark Tide brought us a bloodstained lesson. To keep our people from faltering, I bound myself to silence, locking away what I witnessed on that fateful day.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Fleurdelys, the Unrighteous, deceived us all. She was not the Blessed Maiden chosen by the Sentinel... The true maiden has yet to reveal herself.

options.text: Why did people believe she was the Blessed Maiden?
Where did her power to seal the Dark Tide come from?

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: You must know that a being capable of rivaling our Divinity exists in this world—humanity's eternal adversary, the evil of all civilizations... the Threnodian.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: As the Sentinel has Their Resonator, so does the Threnodian.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: Fleurdelys was shaped—both body and spirit—by our ancient enemy. Her actions were intended to plunge this city into fear and chaos.

items.speaker: Fenrico
items.text: This is the truth I witnessed—Fleurdelys was the <color=yellow>Threnodian's Resonator</color>.
